01
9 Enterprises

Rapid AI LOS

An agentic, AI-native platform to replace Encompass — built by the people who know mortgage best.

Prepared for Kyle Shea, CIO — Rapid Mortgage Company
April 2026 • Confidential

02
The Problem

Encompass Is Holding Us Back

Every IMB in America runs on Encompass. Every IMB hates it. The licensing costs are brutal, the UX is dated, and customization requires ICE's permission.

$

Licensing Costs: $200-400/seat/month

For a company Rapid's size, that is $50-100K+/year just for the LOS. And it scales linearly with headcount.

!

Manual Data Entry Still Dominates

LOs spend 40%+ of their time on data entry, stip management, and condition clearing instead of originating loans.

X

No AI-Native Capabilities

Encompass was built in 2003. AI is bolted on as an afterthought, not woven into the workflow.

?

Fragmented Tool Stack

POS is separate. CRM is separate. Marketing is separate. Nothing talks to each other natively.

~

Vendor Lock-In

ICE/Black Knight controls the roadmap. Customization is limited. You are renting, not owning.

%

Compliance Maintenance Burden

TRID, RESPA, ECOA, HMDA updates require waiting for ICE's release cycle. You cannot move at your own speed.

03
The Vision

One Platform. Fully Agentic. Everything Integrated.

Rapid AI LOS is not just a loan origination system. It is a unified, AI-powered platform that replaces your entire fragmented tool stack with a single agentic layer.

📄
Loan Origination
Full 1003, processing, underwriting, closing
🏠
Point of Sale (POS)
Borrower portal, doc upload, real-time status
👥
CRM
Contact management, pipeline, lead scoring
📨
Marketing Automation
Campaigns, drip sequences, co-branded content
📊
Pricing Engine
Rate lock, investor pricing, best-ex analysis
🔒
Compliance Engine
TRID, RESPA, ECOA, HMDA — baked in, not bolted on
📡
Communication Hub
SMS, email, calls, borrower updates — unified
📈
Reporting & Analytics
Pull-through, margins, LO performance, P&L
🤖
AI Agents
Autonomous stip clearing, doc review, borrower comms
04
Core Innovation

What "Agentic" Actually Means

This is not "AI-assisted." These are autonomous agents that execute tasks from start to finish without human intervention — unless a human decision is genuinely required.

Stip Clearing Agent

  • Reads the conditions list from underwriting
  • Identifies which docs the borrower has already uploaded
  • Matches docs to conditions automatically
  • Requests missing items from the borrower via SMS/email
  • Clears conditions and notifies the processor

Underwriting Pre-Check Agent

  • Runs AUS (DU/LP) findings against loan data
  • Flags guideline violations before submission
  • Suggests corrective actions with specific references
  • Learns from underwriter override patterns
  • Reduces turn times from days to minutes

Borrower Communication Agent

  • Proactive status updates at every milestone
  • Handles "where's my loan?" inquiries 24/7
  • Schedules closings and coordinates with title
  • Sends rate lock alerts and expiration warnings
  • Multi-language support out of the box

Pipeline Management Agent

  • Identifies stalled loans and triggers interventions
  • Predicts pull-through probability by loan
  • Recommends pricing adjustments for margin targets
  • Auto-assigns overflow to available processors
  • Real-time dashboard for branch and corp views
05
Architecture

System Architecture

Clean layers. Modern stack. Built for speed, security, and compliance from day one.

Presentation
React / Next.js Mobile PWA Borrower Portal LO Dashboard Admin Console
▼
AI Agents
Stip Clearing Pre-Underwriting Doc Classification Borrower Comms Pipeline Mgmt
▼
API Layer
REST + GraphQL Webhooks Event Bus Auth (OAuth 2.0) Rate Limiting
▼
Services
Loan Engine Pricing Engine Compliance CRM Doc Mgmt Comms
▼
Integrations
Credit (Equifax/Experian/TU) AUS (DU/LP) Title Appraisal (UCDP) Investors MERS
▼
Data
PostgreSQL Redis Cache S3 Doc Store Vector DB (RAG) Audit Log
06
Execution Strategy

Two-Phase Approach: Zero Risk, Maximum Value

We do not rip and replace. We build on top first, prove the value, then migrate underneath.

1
Phase 1 — Months 1-6

Agentic Layer on Top of Encompass

Rapid keeps Encompass running. Zero disruption. The AI layer reads loan data, automates workflows, and handles communications on top of the existing system.

  • Connects to Encompass via SDK/API
  • AI agents handle stip clearing, borrower updates, doc management
  • Rapid gets immediate productivity gains with zero migration risk
  • Every interaction teaches the system how loans actually flow at Rapid
  • Licensable to other IMBs as a standalone product during this phase
2
Phase 2 — Months 6-12

Custom LOS MVP — Parallel Build

Using learnings from Phase 1, we build the full replacement LOS in parallel. Rapid tests both systems side-by-side.

  • Full loan lifecycle: origination through closing and delivery
  • POS, CRM, marketing, pricing, compliance — all native
  • Parallel testing with live loan volume (shadow mode)
  • Investor delivery and warehouse line integration
  • SOC 2 Type II compliance pathway initiated
3
Phase 3 — Months 12-18

Full Migration — Encompass Eliminated

Rapid migrates off Encompass entirely. All historical data preserved. Full cost savings realized.

  • Data migration with full audit trail
  • Encompass licenses terminated — $50-100K+/year saved
  • Platform licensed to other IMBs at scale
  • Continuous AI improvement from production data
  • Rapid becomes the reference customer and co-development partner
07
Comparison

Encompass vs. Rapid AI LOS

A direct comparison on the dimensions that matter to a CIO running mortgage operations.

Capability Encompass (ICE) Rapid AI LOS
Unified POS + LOS + CRM Separate products Native, single platform
AI-Native Automation Bolt-on, limited Core architecture
Autonomous Agents None Stip, UW, Comms, Pipeline
Per-Seat Licensing $200-400/seat/mo Flat platform fee
Customization Limited, ICE-controlled Full control, open APIs
Compliance Updates ICE release cycle Continuous, same-day
Mobile-First Desktop-centric PWA + native responsive
Data Ownership Their infrastructure Your data, your terms
Integration Flexibility SDK, limited REST, GraphQL, webhooks, open
08
Business Case

Financial Impact

Direct cost savings from eliminating Encompass, plus efficiency gains from AI automation.

$50K+
Annual License Savings
40%
Less Manual Data Entry
3x
Faster Condition Clearing
24/7
Borrower Communication

Revenue Opportunities

  • License the agentic layer to other IMBs during Phase 1
  • License the full LOS platform at scale in Phase 3
  • White-label opportunities for correspondent channels
  • Rapid Mortgage as co-development partner with equity upside

Competitive Moat

  • Every loan processed trains the AI — first mover advantage
  • Rapid becomes the fastest, most efficient IMB in the market
  • LOs close more loans with less overhead
  • Attract top talent with best-in-class technology
09
Why Now

Why 9 Enterprises. Why Now.

We have the mortgage domain expertise, the AI engineering capability, and the insider knowledge of Rapid's exact pain points.

Domain Expertise

Built by people who understand mortgage operations from the inside — not Silicon Valley outsiders guessing at workflows. We know what TRID timing rules actually look like in production.

AI-First Engineering

9 Enterprises builds AI-native systems every day. We do not bolt AI onto legacy architectures. Every component is designed for autonomous agent orchestration from the ground up.

Zero-Risk Entry

Phase 1 requires zero changes to Encompass. The agentic layer runs alongside it. If it does not deliver value, you lose nothing. If it does, you have a head start no competitor can match.

Market Timing

AI adoption in mortgage is in the early innings. Rates are high, margins are compressed, and every basis point of efficiency matters. The companies that automate now will dominate when volume returns.

Rapid's Advantage

As the development partner, Rapid gets: first access to every feature, direct input on the roadmap, preferred pricing in perpetuity, and equity participation in the platform company.

10
Next Steps

Let's Build This Together

Rapid Mortgage has the domain knowledge, the loan volume for testing, and the operational insight. 9 Enterprises has the AI engineering. Combined, we build the platform that replaces Encompass for the entire industry.
